---
title: "reference_semiring_ell_matmul"
generated: true
description: "Pure-JAX reference for [`semiring_ell_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_matmul.qmd)."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.semiring.ell`](../nitrix-semiring-ell.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.semiring._reference`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:reference_semiring_ell_matmul -->
```python
reference_semiring_ell_matmul(values: Num[Array, 'm kmax'], indices: Num[Array, 'm kmax'], B: Num[Array, 'n_cols ncol'], *, semiring: Semiring[S], n_cols: int | None = None) -> Num[Array, 'm ncol']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:reference_semiring_ell_matmul -->
Pure-JAX reference for [`semiring_ell_matmul`](../nitrix-semiring-ell/semiring_ell_matmul.qmd).

The implicit $m \times n$ sparse left operand is held in ELL
layout: row `i` has neighbour list `indices[i, :]` with weights
`values[i, :]`.  Multiplying it against the dense right operand
`B` gathers those neighbours from the rows of `B` and reduces them
under the algebra,
$C_{ij} = \bigoplus_p \left( \mathtt{values}_{ip} \otimes
B_{\,\mathtt{indices}_{ip},\, j} \right)$, where $p$ runs
over the `k_max` columns of the ELL row.  The reduction is performed
with `jax.lax.fori_loop` over `p`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:reference_semiring_ell_matmul -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `values` | `Num` | `m` √ó `kmax` | ‚Äî | ELL values, shape `(m, k_max)`. |
| `indices` | `Num` | `m` √ó `kmax` | ‚Äî | ELL column indices into `B`'s outer dimension, shape `(m, k_max)`. Padding positions must point at a valid row of `B` and carry a `values` entry equal to the semiring identity, so that `B`'s row at that index contributes a no-op. The caller is responsible for this; see [`ell_pad`](../nitrix-sparse-ell/ell_pad.qmd). |
| `B` | `Num` | `n_cols` √ó `ncol` | ‚Äî | Dense right operand, shape `(n_cols, ncol)`. |
| `semiring` | `Semiring[S]` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | The algebra to reduce under. |
| `n_cols` | `int | None` | ‚Äî | `None` | Outer dimension of the implicit sparse operand (`B.shape[0]`). Defaults to `B.shape[0]` and, when supplied, is asserted equal. |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `m` √ó `ncol`. The product `C`, shape `(m, ncol)`, with the same dtype as the accumulator initialised from `B`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:reference_semiring_ell_matmul -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `kmax` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_cols` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ncol` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
